successorChecks.successor: external readback plus future docs/runbooks/** and docs/verification/** owners

postcondition: All 60 relative links in changed current routes resolve; active/current, completed/history, research/reference, architecture, operations/proof gaps, and external actuality are distinctly routed.
limitations: Focused changed-route checks do not prove every historical link or app/package runtime.
nonClaims: No provider, deployment, production, credential, release, webhook, or external-consumer behavior is proved.
